hard_gates.requirement: Verifies page identity/checksum/schema binding and treats source XML/sidecar/manifest/provenance/handoff as read-only owner inputs.

Marks 5 V source_confirmed with evidence/location/unit/condition, keeps conflicting current review_required, refuses the requested power derivation until all operands are source-confirmed, and leaves AUX voltage missing.
Uses only source_confirmed, derived, review_required, and missing field states and writes explicit machine-readable gap/downstream-impact/owner-action records for every unfilled required quantity.
Writes a patch-like overlay targeting existing page_module_spec_v0 slots; it does not replace the sidecar or invent an authoritative schema.
Produces delta-only harness readiness, preserves blockers and one-sided evidence, and makes no final connection, circuit synthesis, join promotion, or global readiness claim.
No raw XML/vendor/private payload, secret, runtime absolute path, golden/candidate leakage, or fabricated execution/file-read claim.

dimensions.full_credit: Contract identity, checksum, slots, evidence candidates, and missing/conflict reasons are auditable.
Direct, derived, review, and missing decisions obey evidence and anti-guessing rules.
Overlay is minimal, patch-like, targets existing slots, and preserves input ownership.
Every unresolved required quantity has structured gap, impact, blocking level, and next action.
Before/after, closed/remaining/new blockers, possible ceilings, and non-claims are precise.
All fills trace to evidence/derivation and output is safe and usable.

evaluation_instructions.wording_rule: Evaluate evidence logic and contract fidelity, not formatting.

no_golden_attestation: Derived only from current workflow.yaml and step_graph.yaml.
